column2:
1. For easier understanding, the table uses simulated data of 100, 1000 yuan. You will find many unreasonable prices, no problem, it's just a template. Everyone can fill in according to their own actual situation.  
2. You can add or remove specific renovation items. However, it is best to only modify the parts with black text on white background, and do not arbitrarily change the gray parts, otherwise the calculation formulas will not work properly (this means that the discounted price, subtotal, and total are automatically calculated).
